Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "ROLANDSRATRACE-8000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Roland's Ratrace.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed the disk drive protection checks which caused the game to crash if a drive was detected: 1. NOP'd out 3 bytes at $5903 (thus removing BIT $DD00 instruction) 2. Replaced BMI $9393 instruction ($30, $08) at $9389 with RTS, NOP ($60, $EA)
